name: Conversations — trends
description: DAU/WAU/MAU + plan completion + persona mix. Auto-generated from infra/admin-console/dashboards/trends.sql.

model.name: conversations
model.description: Flattened conversations: JSONB columns projected as typed columns. Source of truth for downstream questions / metrics / dashboards. When the upstream JSONB shape changes, edit this Model instead of every dashboard.

stages.native:
SELECT
    id,
    session_id,
    investor_name,
    mode,
    created_at,
    (profile->>'age')::int                                  AS age,
    profile->>'persona_id'                                   AS persona_id,
    profile->>'risk_appetite'                                AS risk_appetite,
    (profile->>'investment_horizon_years')::int              AS investment_horizon_years,
    (profile->>'monthly_investible_surplus_inr')::numeric    AS monthly_surplus_inr,
    (profile->>'existing_corpus_inr')::numeric               AS existing_corpus_inr,
    profile->>'life_stage'                                   AS life_stage,
    profile->>'tax_bracket'                                  AS tax_bracket,
    plan IS NOT NULL                                         AS plan_completed,
    coalesce(jsonb_array_length(strategy_chat), 0)           AS revision_count,
    (feedback->>'nps')::int                                  AS nps,
    feedback->>'actionable'                                  AS actionable,
    feedback->>'free_text'                                   AS free_text,
    (feedback->>'submitted_at')::timestamptz                 AS feedback_at,
    (feedback IS NOT NULL)                                   AS feedback_submitted
FROM conversations

metrics.name: Total conversations
metrics.description: Count of all conversations in the model.

metrics.query_description: conversations, Share of rows matching condition
metrics.name: Plan completion rate
metrics.description: Share of conversations that reached the plan stage (plan IS NOT NULL).

metrics.name: Mean revisions per conversation
metrics.description: Average jsonb_array_length(strategy_chat) — proxy for back-and-forth depth.

metrics.name: NPS (30 day)
metrics.description: Net Promoter Score over the last 30 days: (promoters >=9 minus detractors <=6) / respondents, scaled to -100..100. Native SQL because MBQL can't express the arithmetic.

stages.native:
SELECT round(
    100.0 * (
        (count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps >= 9) - count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps <= 6))::numeric
        / nullif(count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps IS NOT NULL), 0)
    ), 0
) AS nps_score
FROM {{#48}} src
WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'

metrics.query_description: conversations, Share of rows matching condition
metrics.name: Feedback completion rate
metrics.description: Share of conversations where the user submitted feedback (feedback IS NOT NULL).

stages.native:
SELECT count(*) AS total,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '7 days')   AS last_7d,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS last_24h,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE plan_completed)                            AS plans_completed
FROM {{#48}} src

cards.name: NPS (30 day)
cards.description: Net Promoter Score over the last 30 days: (promoters >=9 minus detractors <=6) / respondents, scaled to -100..100. Native SQL because MBQL can't express the arithmetic.

stages.native:
SELECT round(
    100.0 * (
        (count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps >= 9) - count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps <= 6))::numeric
        / nullif(count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps IS NOT NULL), 0)
    ), 0
) AS nps_score
FROM {{#48}} src
WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'

cards.query_description: conversations, Share of rows matching condition
cards.name: Feedback completion rate
cards.description: Share of conversations where the user submitted feedback (feedback IS NOT NULL).

stages.native:
SELECT
    date_trunc('week', created_at)::date AS week,
    round(
        100.0 * (
            (count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps >= 9) - count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps <= 6))::numeric
            / nullif(count(*) FILTER (WHERE nps IS NOT NULL), 0)
        ), 0
    ) AS nps_score
FROM {{#48}} src
WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '12 weeks'
    AND nps IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
    feedback_at,
    mode,
    nps,
    actionable,
    free_text
FROM {{#48}} src
WHERE free_text IS NOT NULL AND free_text <> ''
ORDER BY feedback_at DESC
LIMIT 50
